headline: Cardinal Health (CAH) Valuation Check After Recent Sideways Share Performance
summary: Recent performance snapshot for Cardinal Health (CAH) Cardinal Health (CAH) has moved largely sideways in the short term, with the stock close to flat over the past day and week, and a small gain over the past month. Over the past 3 months, the share price is down about 11%, while the year to date return shows a decline of roughly 2%. Looking further back, the 1 year total return is about 31%, with multi year total returns that are much higher. These mixed returns come alongside reported...
